narrative:
Oak Run (precinct in Madison County) has 412 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.6 percentage points.
